code_dossier.name: OSSAPI.java
code_dossier.description: OSS (Object Storage Service) API interface definition that provides abstraction for file upload operations, including single file upload and multi-part upload capabilities. This interface serves as a contract between service consumers and the OSS service implementation.

data.detailed_description:
OSSAPI is a Java interface that defines the contract for interacting with Object Storage Service (OSS) functionality. It is positioned in the third-party-api module, serving as an abstraction layer for file upload operations.

The interface declares two core methods:
1. `uploadFile(OSSUploadFileRequest)` - Handles standard single file uploads, accepting an object name and MultipartFile, returning a response containing the uploaded file's URL.
2. `multiUpload(OSSMultiUploadFileRequest)` - Handles multi-part/chunked file uploads with configurable part size and retry mechanisms, designed for large file uploads.

This interface follows the API-first design pattern, separating the contract definition from implementation. The DTOs (Data Transfer Objects) used as parameters and return types extend from a common BaseResponse, ensuring consistent response handling across the system.

Notable observations:
- The import of `Result` class is unused in the current interface definition, suggesting either incomplete implementation or future planned usage.
- The import of `MultipartFile` is redundant as it's encapsulated within the request DTOs.
- The interface is lightweight and focused, adhering to Interface Segregation Principle.
responsibilities: Define contract for single file upload operations to OSS
Define contract for multi-part/chunked file upload operations to OSS
Provide abstraction layer for OSS service integration
Establish standardized request/response patterns for file upload operations
Enable loose coupling between file upload consumers and OSS implementation

interfaces.name: uploadFile

parameters.name: ossUploadFileRequest
parameters.description: Request object containing objectName and MultipartFile for upload

interfaces.description: Uploads a single file to OSS and returns the URL of the uploaded file

interfaces.name: multiUpload

parameters.name: ossMultiUploadFileRequest
parameters.description: Request object containing file data, partSize for chunking, and maxRetry count

interfaces.description: Performs multi-part upload for large files with configurable part size and retry mechanism
